title: Codereview pass 2: Rust consistency, metrics JSON interop, no dead code, style
description: Independent review pass 2 focusing on Rust-side code. Check consistency across crates (esp. lichen-client metrics/status serde vs hetero_node ad-hoc JSON), JSON interop with test vectors or Python/Zephyr, eliminate all #[allow(dead_code)], enforce Rust style/idioms/clippy. File all findings as P0-P4 beads under this epic. Run cargo check/clippy. Follow /review-rusty workflow.
